# ADR-NNN: [Decision title]

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **ID** | ADR-NNN |
| **Author** | [Your name] |
| **Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Status** | Proposed / Accepted / Deprecated / Superseded |
| **Supersedes** | (ADR-NNN, if applicable) |
| **Superseded by** | (ADR-NNN, if applicable) |

## Context

What is the issue that motivates this decision? What forces are at play? Include technical constraints, business requirements, team capabilities, and timeline pressures.

## Decision

What is the change that is being proposed or decided? State the decision clearly and concisely.

## Consequences

### Positive

- Benefit one
- Benefit two

### Negative

- Trade-off one
- Trade-off two

### Neutral

- Side effect or observation

## Alternatives Considered

| Alternative | Assessment |
|-------------|------------|
| Option A | Why it was not chosen |
| Option B | Why it was not chosen |

## Related

- Links to related ADRs, features, or external resources
